Initial Challenge: Placeholder: every team member does 10 star jumps in the middle of the meadow.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: win a best-of-3 rock paper scissors against a member of another team.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: collect 10 pieces of kindling and stack them by the fire pit.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: toast a marshmallow to a perfect golden brown, judged by a neutral player.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: find and photograph 3 different types of leaf.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: build a freestanding stick tower at least knee height.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: both team members cartwheel (or attempt to) across the field.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: throw a welly further than a member of another team.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: balance an apple (or ball) on your head for 10 seconds.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: catch 5 thrown grapes in your mouth in a row.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: pick up 10 pieces of litter or debris from this area.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: recite a tongue twister 3 times fast without a mistake.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: skim a stone (or do your best attempt) on the water.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: hold a plank for 60 seconds on the shore.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: play hide and seek — one teammate must stay hidden for 2 minutes while the other counts.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: identify 3 bird sounds or spot 3 different birds.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: score a goal/point in any game currently set up on the field.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: win a three-legged race lap against another team pair.
